stem: A scatterplot shows the relationship between two variables, x and y. A line of best fit passes through the points (2, 12) and (10, 4). Which of the following is closest to the slope of the line of best fit?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The slope is (4 − 12)/(10 − 2) = −8/8 = −1.0.

Choices A, B, and C arise from common errors in computing rise/run or sign.
